notes.non_stackable: Canada maintains a non-stackable policy for steel surtaxes. Only one measure applies per good, in order: TRQ surtax > US/China steel surtax > Steel derivative surtax
notes.origin_rules: US origin determined by CUSMA marking rules, not physical shipment origin. China origin by marking rules per Determination of Country of Origin Regulations.
notes.repealed: United States Surtax Order (2025-1) REPEALED effective September 1, 2025. Covered broad consumer goods — no longer in effect.
notes.remission_expired: Manufacturing remission for US steel (SOR/2025-122 s.3) expired February 1, 2026. Manufacturers now pay full 25% surtax on US-origin steel.
